sources.title: Anthropic Software Engineering Manager Salary | levels.fyi
sources.note: Reports $332K-$464K total comp for Anthropic EM, but not broken out by an L3-equivalent entry rung — can't confirm or deny the specific L3 cell.

sources.title: OpenAI Software Engineering Manager Salary | levels.fyi
sources.note: Median $1.27M for OpenAI EM; almost certainly reflects a senior EM band (post product-market-fit, large orgs), not an entry-level first-line manager, so not directly comparable to a 'L3' cell.

sources.title: How to get promoted to Engineering Manager internally | Platform Recruitment
sources.note: Confirms first-line EMs are promoted senior/staff ICs, supporting the structural mismatch argument for an 'L3' EM rung.

sources.title: Meta M1 Software Engineering Manager Salary | levels.fyi
sources.note: M1 (Meta's actual first-line/entry manager level) averages $791,563 total comp — base $271,763, stock $487,917, bonus $31,883 — dramatically higher than this dataset's faang-mag7 L3 EM total comp of ~$241k.

sources.title: What Software Engineering Managers Make at Google, Meta, Amazon | Dice.com
sources.note: General confirmation that FAANG EM comp bands run high relative to generic IC-scaled numbers.

sources.title: Engineering Manager: Average Salary & Pay Trends 2026 | Glassdoor
sources.note: Blended EM average $226,860 (p25 $182,852, p75 $286,033, p90 $349,725) across all company types/levels — a loose sanity floor, not level- or tier-specific validation.

sources.title: Startup salaries in 2026: What to pay from seed to Series C | Ravio
sources.note: General confirmation that growth-stage cash comp trails large-tech comp, with equity offsetting; no level-specific EM breakdown found.

sources.title: Series A Stage Startup Software Engineering Manager Salary & Equity Data | levels.fyi
sources.note: Page exists but returned no extractable percentile content via fetch; could not verify against this cell.

sources.title: Seed Stage Startup Software Engineer Salary & Equity Data | levels.fyi
sources.note: Confirms levels.fyi tracks seed-stage comp by function/level for ICs, but no comparable granular EM-specific seed-stage data was retrievable to validate this cell.

sources.title: How to Hire an Engineering Manager: 2026 Guide | KORE1
sources.note: General guidance that early-stage EM hires skew very senior/experienced, supporting the argument that an 'L3-equivalent' EM is atypical at this tier.
